properties.name: app.security.admin-key
properties.description: Admin key required in X-Admin-Key header for admin endpoints.

properties.name: app.security.rate-limit.general-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum number of general API requests per client per minute.

properties.name: app.security.rate-limit.sensitive-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum number of sensitive API requests per client per minute.

properties.name: app.security.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT access tokens.

properties.name: app.security.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT access token expiration in milliseconds.
